2026-02-07 23:57:03.735 +02:00 [INF] Fetching all gifts
2026-02-07 23:57:03.751 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (9ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [g].[Id], [g].[CategoryModelId], [g].[Description], [g].[DonorModelId], [g].[Image], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice], [g].[UserModelId], [g].[isRaffleDone], [d].[Id], [d].[Email], [d].[FirstName], [d].[LastName], [d].[Phone], [c].[Id], [c].[Name], [u].[Id], [u].[Email], [u].[FirstName], [u].[LastName], [u].[Password], [u].[Phone], [u].[Role]
FROM [gifts] AS [g]
INNER JOIN [donors] AS [d] ON [g].[DonorModelId] = [d].[Id]
